biography:
Rocci - Boy Williams was born November, 1978 in Basingstoke. Always eager to keep the room entertained, Rocci was keen on Acting from a young age.

After a number of years as a professional mixed martial artist Rocci decided to follow his dreams of acting and landed his first Role in Angel has fallen acting opposite Gerard Butler. Soon after he was cast alongside Jason Statham in Guy Ritchies Wrath of man.

In the sequel to Don't Breath Rocci was able to utilise his background in MMA (and not to mention he is a black belt in Brazilian Jiu JItsu) in one of the most brutal fight sequences on screen. "Performing all of my own stunts added to the realism of the fight scene" ~ Rocci Williams.
name: Rocci Williams
